name_en: New Dior Tote with Linen Embroidery
name_cn:
New Dior Tote with Linen Embroidery
Crafted from jute canvas, this Book Tote measures 36.5*28cm. Designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this mainstay piece embodies Dior aesthetics. The medium size features a "CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS" logo on the front, showcasing Dior's signature craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand or on the shoulder.
Front features "CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS" logo
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy
Style: 8001
